message.content: We need to split the orders table before the Q3 launch. Help me pick a migration strategy.

content.thinking: Both online schema change and dual-write are viable here; the choice depends on downtime tolerance and rollout risk appetite.

questions.question: How much write downtime can the orders table tolerate?

options.label: None (zero-downtime required)
options.description: Dual-write with backfill, cut over behind a flag

options.label: Up to 5 minutes
options.description: Online schema change during the low-traffic window

options.label: A full maintenance window
options.description: Straight ALTER TABLE migration, simplest to verify

questions.question: Where should the migration run first?

options.label: Staging only
options.description: Validate for a week before touching production

options.label: Staging then canary shard
options.description: Promote to one production shard after staging passes
